---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks or housekeeping items
title: "[MAINTENANCE] "
labels: ["maintenance"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🔧 Maintenance Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## 📋 Tasks to Complete
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

## 🎯 Purpose
Explain why this maintenance is necessary and what it accomplishes.

## ⏰ Timeline
- **Estimated Time**: [e.g., 2 hours, 1 day]
- **Target Date**: [e.g., 2024-01-15]
- **Impact**: [e.g., Low, Medium, High]

## 🔍 Areas Affected
List the areas of the codebase or system that will be affected:
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Performance improvements
- [ ] Security patches
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **Breaking Changes**: Yes/No
- **User Impact**: Low/Medium/High
- **System Downtime**: Yes/No

## 📝 Additional Notes
Add any additional context or notes about this maintenance task.

## ✅ Completion Criteria
- [ ] All tasks completed
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code reviewed
